programs.name: PM-KISAN
programs.description: Income support for qualifying landholding farmer families.
programs.program_active_note: Current operation was not independently verified in this environment.

land_cutoff_and_inheritance.needed: Verify the cutoff, succession and inheritance clauses against the original PM-KISAN PDF.

nri_exclusion.needed: Verify the NRI clause against the original official guideline/circular.

required_documents.needed: Official accepted document, field, validity and verification checklist.

self_declaration.needed: Verify the exclusion self-declaration clause in the original official PDF.

follow_up_questions.question: Does your farmer family own cultivable land?
Is the land held by an institution?
Does any family member fall within the listed constitutional-post, minister, legislator, mayor, or district-panchayat-chairperson categories?
Does any family member fall within the excluded serving or retired government, PSE, autonomous-institution, or local-body employee categories, after applying the stated staff exceptions?
Does any family member receive a monthly pension of at least Rs 10,000 under the listed category, after applying the stated staff exceptions?
Did any family member pay income tax in the last assessment year?
Is any family member a listed registered professional who is actively practising?

eligibility_rules.description: The farmer family must own cultivable land.
The supplied official public-office categories are excluded.
The supplied government/PSE/local-body employee categories are excluded subject to stated staff exceptions.
Specified pensioners receiving at least Rs 10,000 monthly are excluded subject to stated staff exceptions.
Persons who paid income tax in the last assessment year are excluded.
Listed registered professionals actively carrying out practice are excluded.

programs.name: National Means-cum-Merit Scholarship Scheme (NMMSS)
programs.description: NMMSS fresh-selection rules from the supplied revised guidelines; applications are processed through NSP.
programs.program_active_note: True only from observed AY 2026-27 portal/application activity. No official extension or renewal instrument confirming post-March-2026 policy authority was supplied or independently located.

post_2026_authority.needed: Official extension, continuation, Cabinet approval or revised guideline covering AY 2026-27.

age_band_13_15.needed: The reported 13-15 age band is absent from the supplied revised guidelines and is not an active rule.

required_documents.needed: Current AY 2026-27 fresh/renewal document and verification checklist.

application_deadline.needed: Verify the observed 31 August 2026 deadline on an official national/state notification.

follow_up_questions.question: What is the student's parental annual income from all sources?
Which class is the student entering for the fresh award?
Is the student a regular student in a Government, Government-aided, or local-body school and not in a KV, JNV, excluded residential school, or private school?
Does the student meet the Class VII marks rule: 55%, or 50% for the stated SC/ST relaxation?
Does the student meet the combined MAT/SAT rule: 40%, or 32% for SC/ST?
Does the student meet the Class VIII award-stage marks rule: 55%, or 50% for SC/ST?
Is the student availing another Central Government scholarship?

eligibility_rules.description: Parental income must not exceed Rs 3,50,000 per annum from all sources at selection.
The fresh scholarship is for eligible regular students entering Class IX.
The student must attend an eligible Government, Government-aided, or local-body school and not an excluded school type.
The Class VII marks requirement, including the stated SC/ST relaxation, must be met.
The combined MAT/SAT pass requirement, including the stated SC/ST cutoff, must be met.
The Class VIII award-stage marks requirement, including the stated SC/ST relaxation, must be met.
A student may avail only one Central Government scholarship.

bihar_state_beneficiary_database.needed: Official Bihar beneficiary dataset, inclusion mapping, version and verification mechanism. Do not infer this from the national baseline.

exclusion_list.needed: No official exclusion list was present in the supplied NHA page text.

required_documents.needed: Official accepted identity/family/verification documents for the chosen state workflow.

senior_70_plus_top_up.needed: Verify the separate 70+ provision through an NHA/PM-JAY primary release before use.
